steps.title: Identify the conversion factor
steps.content: We need to convert from kilograms to grams. We're given that 1 kilogram = 1,000 grams, so to convert any mass from kg to g, we multiply by 1,000.

steps.title: Multiply the mass by the conversion factor
steps.content:
The dog's mass is 42 kg, so multiply by the conversion factor:
$$42 \times 1,000 = 42,000$$
The dog's mass is 42,000 grams.
